title: referrals — declared entitlements
description: Nine entitlement keys. `referrals_capture` is the boolean master gate for the module (on for every tier). `referrals_program_slot` caps the number of referral programs per tenant. `referrals_code_slot` caps campaign codes only — user-scoped codes are always free. `referrals_advanced_reward_types` (Medium+) enables free_months, free_sessions, credits, point_award — Small only allows percent_discount + fixed_amount. `referrals_double_sided` (Medium+) enables double-sided programs. `referrals_fraud_detection` (Medium+) enables the FraudDetector rule surface. `referrals_program_budget_cap` (Medium+) enables max_rewards_per_program. `referrals_manual_override` (Enterprise) enables admin force-vest + admin fraud override. `referrals_extended_retention` (Enterprise) extends 7y -> 10y for financial audit alignment.

entitlements.description: Master feature gate. Off = the whole module is inert: no programs may be created, existing programs paused, /me routes return 402. Every tier defaults on — off is an emergency ops-flip only.
enforcedBy: ReferralProgramObserver refuses create when the gate is closed
ReferralObserver refuses create when the gate is closed
SDUI surfaces hidden when features array does not include 'referrals.core'

entitlements.description: How many referral programs a tenant can have concurrently. Small: 1 (one simple program per tenant). Medium: 5. Enterprise: unlimited (null cap). Consumed on program create; released on archive.

Cap on CAMPAIGN codes per tenant. User-scoped codes (auto-issued via IssueReferralCodeJob) are always free — this cap only applies to admin-created campaign + opaque codes. Small: 0 (no campaign codes; user codes only). Medium: unlimited. Enterprise: unlimited.
enforcedBy: ReferralCodeObserver.creating (for campaign / opaque codes only) consumes 1 unit

entitlements.description: Enables reward types beyond the Small baseline. Small: only percent_discount + fixed_amount. Medium+: adds free_months, free_sessions, credits, point_award.
enforcedBy: ReferralProgramObserver.creating refuses when reward_type IS IN advanced set AND entitlement is off
ReferralRewardObserver.creating refuses when reward_type is advanced AND entitlement is off (edge case: entitlement revoked mid-flight)

entitlements.description: Enables double-sided programs — where both referrer and referred receive a reward. Small: single-sided only (referrer reward only).
enforcedBy: ReferralProgramObserver.creating refuses when side='double_sided' AND entitlement is off

entitlements.description: Enables the FraudDetector rule surface. Small: NO fraud detection — permissive default (fraud_score always 0 for Small tenants). Medium+: rule-based detection with all fraud rules active.
enforcedBy: FraudDetector no-ops when tenant lacks the entitlement
SDUI fraud-flag surface hidden when features does not include 'referrals.fraud_detection'

entitlements.description: Enables max_rewards_per_program budget capping. Small: no budget cap (implicit — Small tenants set no cap). Medium+: budget cap can be configured per program.
enforcedBy: ReferralProgramObserver.creating refuses when max_rewards_per_program IS NOT NULL AND entitlement is off
ReconcileProgramBudgetJob evaluates + fires ReferralProgramBudgetReached when cap is enabled + reached

entitlements.description: Enterprise-only. Enables admin force-vest (POST /referrals/{id}/force-vest) and admin manual fraud override (disposition=manual_override_approved). Audit-critical operations that require the tenant to opt into the elevated privilege.
enforcedBy: ReferralFraudFlagObserver refuses disposition=manual_override_approved when the entitlement is off

entitlements.description: Enterprise-only. Extends retention from 7y default to 10y for financial audit alignment. Some regulated tenants require 10y for tax audit trails.
enforcedBy: PurgeArchivedReferralsJob reads the entitlement to select the retention window (7y default; 10y when on)
